query: SELECT 'test_patients' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User' UNION ALL SELECT 'test_protocols' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM protocols WHERE name LIKE 'Test %' OR name LIKE 'Restore Test %';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT 'test_patients' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User' UNION ALL SELECT 'test_protocols' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM protocols WHERE name LIKE 'Test %' OR name LIKE 'Restore Test %';
